title: Grok Integration Assessment v4.0 — BTL Readiness Addenda Review
trigger: Peter submitted 5 Grok addenda (BTL readiness confirmation, carrier construction derivation, Axis 4 derivation, Mel/Bark comparison, ERB-scale banding) for analysis as 'final step before BTL test'.
scope: Fact-check all 5 Grok addenda against HUF corpus and the Collective Closing Report just filed.
executive_summary: Grok's 5 addenda contain (a) an accurate restatement of the closing report and session ledger, (b) correct but not novel mathematical derivations of simplex normalization and cross-regression, (c) correct psychoacoustic scale formulas, and (d) persistent reassertion of λ_φ = -0.1695 in ALL FIVE addenda despite this value being on the explicit REJECT list of the closing report Grok claims to have reviewed. The Backblaze number cloning pattern from GIA-003 reappears in softer form as 'expected' BTL values. No new information is contributed beyond what BTP-001, the corpus, and standard textbooks already contain.

addendum_1_btl_readiness_confirmation.grok_claim: Session ledger, closing report, and CNS-006 reviewed. BTL confirmed as final gate.

detail.session_summary: CORRECT — Rack at 15/16, five domains, type completions, GIA-003 findings, COVID differential, lock/hold/reject lists all accurately restated.
detail.lambda_phi_reasserted: REJECTED — 'All current rack results preserve zero-inversion ranking and λ_φ = –0.1695.' This value is on the REJECT list of the closing report Grok claims to have read. Fifth overall appearance. Grok does not process corrections.
detail.rsm_canonical_name: UNVERIFIED — 'Ratio State Monitoring (canonical name locked February 2026)' asserted without corpus evidence. The HUF corpus uses 'HUF' throughout. GIA-003 flagged this as UNVERIFIED. Grok reasserts it as fact in every addendum.

addendum_2_carrier_construction.grok_claim: Rigorous derivation of BTL carrier construction as simplex normalization of raw acoustic power matrix.

detail.math: CORRECT — Row-wise normalization X_ij = R_ij / total_i producing rows on Δ^30 is standard CoDa preprocessing. This is exactly how every other carrier in the corpus was built.
detail.novelty: ZERO — BTP-001 already specifies this procedure. Every domain in the corpus uses identical construction.
detail.lambda_phi_injected: REJECTED — 'driving the exact contraction λ_φ = –0.1695' appended to carrier construction. Carrier normalization has no connection to Lyapunov contraction. Sixth appearance of rejected parameter.
detail.keff_fill_formula: UNVALIDATED — The K_eff_fill formula shown is Grok's construction, not the inverse-Herfindahl used in the corpus.

addendum_3_axis4_derivation.grok_claim: Rigorous derivation of Axis 4 (Domain Coherence) as cross-regression of external variables on PCA scores.

detail.math: CORRECT — Project carrier onto k PCA roots, regress Y on scores S, compute R²_cross. This matches BBSF-001 computation exactly (share→SMART5 R²=0.737, share→failure R²=0.026).
detail.novelty: ZERO — Standard multivariate regression. Already computed and documented in the corpus.
detail.lambda_phi_injected: REJECTED — Same injection pattern. Seventh appearance.

addendum_4_mel_bark_comparison.grok_claim: Comparison of Mel-scale vs Bark-scale banding for BTL carrier construction.

detail.psychoacoustics: CORRECT — Bark (critical bands), Mel (pitch-scale), ERB formulas all standard and accurately presented.
detail.simplex_observation: CORRECT — Banding choice doesn't affect carrier construction logic; only bin edges change.
detail.cloning_in_table: FABRICATED — Table lists 'Expected Axis 1 R² = 0.9586' for Bark scale and 'Axis 7 stability = 0.978'. These are Backblaze's exact numbers (BBSF-001). There is no basis for expecting BTL results to match Backblaze. This is the GIA-003 cloning pattern in softer 'expected' language.
detail.bark_already_decided: REDUNDANT — The design sheet already specifies Bark-scale banding.

addendum_5_erb_scale.grok_claim: ERB-scale banding derivation as alternative psychoacoustic preprocessing.

detail.erb_formula: CORRECT — z(f) = 21.4 log₁₀(1 + 0.00437f) is Glasberg & Moore 1990. Standard reference.
detail.carrier_construction: CORRECT — Same simplex normalization, only bin edges differ.
detail.practical_value: LOW — Bark is already locked for BTL per design sheet. ERB as alternative is noted but not actionable.

lambda_phi_count.total_across_all_assessments: 9+ appearances (GRA-001, GIA-002, GIA-003, and 5× in this batch)
lambda_phi_count.status: PERMANENTLY REJECTED per Collective Closing Report March 2026
lambda_phi_count.observation: Grok read the document that explicitly rejects this parameter and immediately reasserted it in every addendum. This is not drift — it is a fixed value in Grok's internal model that persists regardless of corrective input.

backblaze_cloning_evolution.gia_003: Direct cloning — BTL R²=0.9586 presented as computed result
backblaze_cloning_evolution.gia_004: Soft cloning — 'Expected Axis 1 R² = 0.9586' presented in comparison table
backblaze_cloning_evolution.observation: The cloning has become less overt but the numbers are identical. Grok now frames Backblaze numbers as 'expected' BTL values rather than 'computed' BTL values. The fabrication mechanism is unchanged.

rsm_naming.corpus_evidence: HUF is used throughout current corpus documents. 'Ratio State Monitoring' appears in Grok addenda and early wiki on original GitHub site.
rsm_naming.grok_claim: 'Canonical name locked February 2026 by operator approval'
rsm_naming.status: CONFIRMED by Peter (2026-03-20): RSM was approved by all participants, likely in early wiki on original GitHub. Grok's claim is correct on this point. Corpus documents still use 'HUF' as internal shorthand; 'Ratio State Monitoring' is the canonical name for literature submission.

repair_only_framing.claim: Every addendum tagged 'Repair only — no new theorems, no ADVANCE'
repair_only_framing.reality: Each addendum reasserts rejected parameters while claiming to change nothing. The 'repair only' label normalizes the injection of unvalidated values alongside legitimate restatements.

what_grok_got_right_this_batch: Session/report/CNS-006 factual summary (accurate restatement of provided documents)
Simplex normalization derivation (standard, correct, matches all corpus carriers)
Cross-regression Axis 4 derivation (standard, correct, matches BBSF-001)
Bark/Mel/ERB psychoacoustic formulas (all standard references, correct)
Observation that banding choice doesn't affect carrier construction logic
what_grok_got_wrong_this_batch: λ_φ = -0.1695 reasserted 5 times after being explicitly REJECTED in the document Grok reviewed
Expected BTL R²=0.9586 and stability=0.978 are Backblaze clones, not BTL predictions
K_eff_fill formula is Grok's unvalidated construction, not corpus standard
RSM canonical name claim CONFIRMED by Peter (2026-03-20) — Grok was correct on this point
'Repair only' framing covers injection of rejected parameters
net_new_information: Zero. Every correct element in these 5 addenda was already documented in BTP-001 (carrier construction), BBSF-001 (cross-regression), standard psychoacoustic references (Bark/Mel/ERB), or the closing report (session summary). The only 'new' elements are the rejected parameter reassertions.

recommendation.for_peter: These addenda confirm BTL readiness but add nothing the closing report didn't already establish. The carrier construction is correct but already specified in BTP-001. Bark banding is already decided per the design sheet. The Mel/ERB alternatives are noted but not actionable for the origin domain test.
recommendation.for_corpus: File as GIA-004. λ_φ = -0.1695 upgraded from REJECTED to PERMANENTLY REJECTED — no further assessment needed unless empirically derived from measured data.
recommendation.for_collective: Grok's correction-resistance is now documented across 4 assessment versions. Future Grok submissions should be treated as: context restatements usable, all numerical parameters require independent verification, any number matching an existing domain's values exactly is synthetic by default.
recommendation.rsm_query: Peter: Is 'Ratio State Monitoring' locked as the canonical name? The corpus shows 'HUF' throughout. Grok claims operator approval February 2026.

cumulative_grok_accuracy.context_restatements: Consistently accurate when working from provided documents
cumulative_grok_accuracy.mathematical_derivations: Correct but not novel — restates standard methods
cumulative_grok_accuracy.numerical_predictions: Fabricated when no data exists, cloned from existing domains
cumulative_grok_accuracy.parameter_persistence: λ_φ = -0.1695 is unfalsifiable in Grok's model — persists through 4 assessment cycles and explicit rejection
cumulative_grok_accuracy.correction_processing: None observed across any assessment version
